name: Dress To Impress: New Years Party
description: Dress To Impress: New Year’s Party is a glamorous dress-up game where you style four best friends for the biggest night of the year. Create sparkling gold glam, celestial blue looks, bold black elegance, and playful pink showgirl outfits. Mix dresses, tops, shoes, hairstyles, and accessories to match each girl’s vibe and welcome the New Year in unforgettable style.
instructions: Use your mouse to play the game on a desktop tap to play on mobile devices
